# API Contracts Requirements Checklist: Web UI Graph Browser

**Purpose**: Validate that SPEC-006 API contract requirements are complete, clear, consistent, and measurable for the local web API, chat adapter, re-analysis progress, and static package routes.
**Created**: 2026-07-15
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all shipped read routes consumed by the web UI enumerated by reference to the authoritative OpenAPI contract rather than duplicated incompletely in the spec? [Completeness, Spec FR-039, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK002 Are non-repo-scoped routes distinguished from repo-scoped read routes so `/api/status` and `/api/repos` cannot be treated as selected-repository calls? [Completeness, Spec FR-040, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK003 Are search, node, callers, callees, graph, impact, flows, and clusters requirements complete about using optional `?repo=<repo-id>` where the OpenAPI contract supports it? [Completeness, Spec FR-040, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK004 Are re-analysis start, latest-state, and EventSource routes documented with the path-scoped repo id and one-active-job-per-repo behavior? [Completeness, Spec FR-045, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK005 Are duplicate re-analysis starts specified as existing `409` behavior rather than a browser-specific state? [Completeness, Spec FR-045, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK006 Are re-analysis SSE requirements complete for snapshot, progress, terminal events, heartbeat comments, already-finished terminal snapshots, slow-consumer progress coalescing, disconnect-does-not-cancel behavior, and no replay? [Resolved, Spec FR-045, Data Model ReanalysisJob, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK007 Are chat status, message generation, and bundle redemption routes defined as a thin same-origin adapter over SPEC-018? [Completeness, Spec FR-041, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md]
- [x] CHK008 Are chat request payload requirements limited to repo id, prompt, selected symbol, view, and bounded context hints? [Completeness, Spec FR-042, Data Model ChatRequest, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md]
- [x] CHK009 Are static package route requirements complete for `/`, extensionless browser routes, missing asset-extension paths, path traversal attempts, and `/api/*` separation? [Completeness, Spec FR-024, Spec FR-047, Contract static-package-contract.md]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK010 Is the OpenAPI file clearly named as authoritative for shipped status, repo, search, node, relationship, graph, impact, flow, cluster, and re-analysis routes? [Clarity, Spec FR-039, Clarifications API and Chat]
- [x] CHK011 Are opaque repo ids and node ids treated as backend-owned identifiers rather than browser-parsed filesystem paths? [Clarity, Spec FR-040, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK012 Are graph and impact truncation requirements clear about using backend flags and visible disclosures instead of assuming complete neighborhoods? [Clarity, Spec FR-014, Spec FR-016, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK013 Are success-shaped degraded states distinguished from non-2xx JSON error envelopes? [Clarity, Spec FR-046, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK014 Are chat response states clear enough to distinguish answer, fallback, pending bundle, disabled, dormant, misconfigured, rate-limited, and error paths? [Resolved, Spec FR-036, Spec FR-044, Data Model ChatResponse, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md]
- [x] CHK015 Are chat context-boundary requirements clear about backend-owned graph context assembly and visible truncation metadata? [Clarity, Spec FR-042, Data Model ChatContextBoundary, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md]
- [x] CHK016 Are provider-secret boundaries explicit about excluding provider URL, model, API key, provider bearer token, raw provider responses, and secret surrogates from browser payloads and UI? [Clarity, Spec FR-020, Spec FR-043, Data Model ChatStatus, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md]
- [x] CHK017 Are package-serving requirements clear about package-shipped `dist/web` assets and no external runtime CDN or hosted service calls? [Clarity, Spec FR-023, Spec FR-024, Contract static-package-contract.md]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK018 Do API client requirements consistently require relative same-origin `/api/*` REST or EventSource routes across web API, chat, and packaged runtime contracts? [Consistency, Spec FR-047, Contract web-api-contract.md, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md, Contract static-package-contract.md]
- [x] CHK019 Do non-loopback bearer-token requirements align across the spec, web API contract, static package contract, and repository status data model? [Consistency, Spec Edge Cases, Spec FR-036, Spec FR-047, Spec FR-052, Data Model RepositoryStatus]
- [x] CHK020 Do chat disabled, dormant, misconfigured, rate-limited, pending-bundle, fallback, unavailable, and error states align between spec requirements, data model, and chat adapter contract? [Resolved, Spec FR-021, Spec FR-044, Data Model ChatStatus, Data Model ChatResponse, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md]
- [x] CHK021 Do re-analysis progress requirements align between the spec, data model, OpenAPI route semantics, and web API contract? [Resolved, Spec FR-045, Data Model ReanalysisJob, Contract web-api-contract.md]
- [x] CHK022 Do static route fallback rules consistently prevent `/api/*` routes from being swallowed by the SPA shell? [Consistency, Spec FR-024, Spec FR-047, Contract static-package-contract.md]
- [x] CHK023 Do clean-room parity requirements consistently block executable flows for backend capabilities absent from OpenAPI except the approved chat and static-serving deltas? [Consistency, Spec FR-048, Spec FR-050, Research R3, Contract web-api-contract.md]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK024 Are API client contract checks measurable for request URL construction across repo-scoped and non-repo-scoped routes? [Measurability, Contract web-api-contract.md Acceptance Checks]
- [x] CHK025 Are re-analysis contract checks measurable for start, duplicate active job, latest job, SSE snapshots, progress, terminal states, already-finished jobs, slow consumers, disconnects, and no replay? [Resolved, Spec FR-045, Contract web-api-contract.md Acceptance Checks]
- [x] CHK026 Are chat contract checks measurable for no provider config serialization and explicit dormant, misconfigured, endpoint-active, endpoint-fallback, pending-bundle, completed-bundle, rate-limited, and backend-error states? [Measurability, Spec SC-007, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md Acceptance Checks]
- [x] CHK027 Are chat error-envelope checks measurable for malformed request, unknown repo or bundle, unauthorized, unavailable, and sanitized internal fault cases? [Resolved, Spec FR-046, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md Acceptance Checks]
- [x] CHK028 Are static package checks measurable for `dist/web`, package-style `codegraph serve --web`, browser route fallback, `/api/*` separation, missing asset 404s, and no external runtime requests? [Measurability, Spec SC-011, Contract static-package-contract.md Offline/Package Validation]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK029 Are primary API scenarios covered from repository selection through search, symbol details, graph, impact, re-analysis, and chat? [Coverage, Spec US1-US7, Spec FR-039-FR-047]
- [x] CHK030 Are exception scenarios covered for malformed input, unknown repo or node ids, daemon unavailable, unauthorized non-loopback access, duplicate re-analysis, disconnected SSE, and chat backend faults? [Coverage, Spec Edge Cases, Spec FR-036, Spec FR-045, Spec FR-046, Contracts web-api-contract.md and chat-adapter-contract.md]
- [x] CHK031 Are offline/package scenarios covered separately from backend-unreachable API states so static runtime validation does not imply API availability? [Coverage, Spec FR-023, Spec FR-024, Spec FR-036, Spec SC-008, Contract static-package-contract.md]
- [x] CHK032 Are unsupported backend capability scenarios covered with deferred, backend-blocked, or out-of-scope dispositions instead of executable UI contracts? [Coverage, Spec FR-048, Spec FR-050, Spec FR-051, Research R3]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK033 Are SPEC-005 dependencies traceable for local server auth, same-origin API behavior, OpenAPI read routes, re-analysis jobs, and SSE semantics? [Traceability, Spec Assumptions, Spec FR-039, Spec FR-045, src/server/openapi.yaml]
- [x] CHK034 Are SPEC-018 dependencies traceable for endpoint, agent-bundle, dormant, misconfigured, fallback, provider-secret, and backend-owned generation behavior? [Traceability, Spec Assumptions, Spec FR-041-FR-044, Research R4, Contract chat-adapter-contract.md]
- [x] CHK035 Are package/static dependencies traceable for Vite build output, root asset copying, npm package inclusion, route fallback, and container or non-loopback guidance? [Traceability, Spec FR-052, Research R5, Contract static-package-contract.md]

## Notes

- Checklist focus: shipped OpenAPI consumption, repo scoping, re-analysis jobs and SSE, same-origin SPEC-018 chat adapter, provider-secret boundaries, error envelopes, and static package route fallback.
- Depth: Standard reviewer gate for Phase 4 API Contracts requirements quality.
- Initial run 2026-07-15: CHK006, CHK014, CHK020, CHK021, CHK025, and CHK027 required spec, data-model, or contract remediation.
- Rerun 2026-07-15: all API Contracts requirement gaps are resolved by the FR-045 SSE refinement, ChatResponse dormant/rate-limited states, and chat adapter error-envelope rules.
